summary: Cemetery management app with grave map. User wants to add grave number editing and grave deletion functionality directly from the map/admin panel.

existing_features.title: Add the ability to edit a grave's plot number (and/or alley) directly from the admin panel — both from the grave tile map view (AdminGraveTileMap) and from the grave management list (GraveManagement). The edit action should be accessible via the existing GraveEditDialog or a dedicated inline control, and must persist the change to the backend.

Add the ability to delete a grave record directly from the admin panel — both from the grave tile map view (AdminGraveTileMap) and from the grave management list (GraveManagement). A confirmation dialog must be shown before the deletion is executed.

new_feature_requests.summary: Edit grave number and delete grave directly from the map/admin panel
